revision.comment: Robertsky moved page [[Template:EstcatCountry]] to [[Template:Establishment category in country]]: [[Special:Permalink/1199414969|Requested]] by HouseBlaster at [[WP:RM/TR]]: Expand template name per [[WP:TPN]]. (Please also check the "move all subpages" box, which would also move {{[[Template:EstcatCountry/core|EstcatCountry/core]]}}.) Thanks!
